message:
Running command: echo "Current time: $(date)"
echo "=== Synthesis log progress ==="
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
wc -l "$SYNTH_LOG"
echo ""
echo "=== Tail 15 lines of synthesis log ==="
tail -15 "$SYNTH_LOG"
echo ""
echo "=== Is yosys process making CPU progress? ==="
ps -p 216314 -o pid,pcpu,pmem,etime,stat 2>/dev/null || echo "Yosys PID 216314 gone"
echo ""
# Also check if there are any newer yosys PIDs
pgrep -f "yosys" | xargs -r ps -o pid,pcpu,pmem,etime,stat -p 2>/dev/null
